page_title: Do You Feel Like I Feel
text:
Do You Feel Like I Feel (私が感じているように感じますか, Do You Feel Like I Feel) is the second ending theme of the Hunter × Hunter 1999 anime adaptation and was sung by Nagai Masato. 

Characters in Order of Appearance

Lyrics

Video

TV Version

 
「Eじゃん」_Do_You_Feel_Like_I_Feel|Do You Feel Like I Feel (TV Version)
 

Full Version

 
Hunter x Hunter - E-Jan - Do You Feel Like I Feel?|Full Version
